final_prompt.prompt:
Create a tactical gear showcase display featuring firearms, body armor, and night-vision equipment (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "硬核军事" tactical aesthetic — references in the spirit of Tom Clancy military-tech concept art, 1990s military equipment catalog photography, Call of Duty loadout UI design; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be an organized grid or symmetrical arrangement of tactical gear pieces
Subject: must include firearms, ballistic vest, and night-vision goggles arranged neatly
Scene/backdrop: must be a dark background setting
Lighting/mood: needs a cold, professional, authoritative atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cold/cool direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: must include tactical fabric textures, matte metal finishes, and technical equipment surfaces
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
